description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request verification of crew information. The Office responds with a Verify Employee Info Reponse (01000) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that is to verify the employee information, left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Initialization request 2 - Departure test request Employee Identifier Length 1 Numeric String length of the Employee Identifier up to 8 characters Employee Identifier Variable Alphanumeric Employee identifier Encrypted Employee PIN 16 Numeric Employee PIN (Encrypted) See section 1.3.4 for details

description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to obtain a list of train symbols to which the Locomotive is assigned. The Office responds with a Train ID List (01001) message.

description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to provide the crew-selected train ID. The Office confirms receipt of the message with the Confirmation of Selected Train ID (01004) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad from which the train ID ws sent, left justified space filled Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not Used 1 - Initialization 2 - Response to a request from the office Clearance Number Length 1 Numeric String length of clearance number up to 8 characters Clearance Number Variable Alphanumeric Clearance number Train ID Length 1 Numeric Train ID length up to 30 characters Train ID Variable Alphanumeric Train ID Employee Identifier Length 1 Numeric String length of the Employee Identifier up to 8 characters Employee Identifier Variable Alphanumeric Employee identifier Employee First Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee first name up to 20 characters Employee First Name Variable Alphabetic Employee first name Employee Middle Initial Size 1 Numeric Size of employee middle initial up to 1 character Employee Middle Initial Variable Alphabetic Employee middle initial Employee Last Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee last name up to 32 characters Employee Last Name Variable Alphabetic Employee last name Onboard Software Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Onboard Software Version up to 20 characters Onboard Software Version Variable Printable ASCII Onboard software version currently installed Common Configuration Fileset Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Common Configuration Fileset Version up to 20 characters Common Configuration Fileset Version Variable Printable ASCII Common configuration fileset version currently installed Railroad Specific Configuration Fileset Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Railroad Specific Configuration Fileset Version up to 20 characters Railroad Specific Configuration Fileset Version Variable Printable ASCII Railroad specific configuration fileset version currently installed

description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request information in order to validate its configuration. The Office responds with the Configuration Version List (01005) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad with which the locomotive configuration is to be validated , left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Number of Repositories 1 Numeric Number of repositories that need to be validated For each Repository Repeated as per ‘Number of Repositories’ Repository Name Length 1 Numeric String length of the repository up to 50 characters Repository Name Variable Printable ASCII Repository name
source_heading_line: 1.6.4 L2I40 (02005) Configuration Version List Request - Version 3

description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to obtain the list of subdivisions / districts for which the Locomotive needs mandatory directives. The Office responds with a Train Subdivision/District List (01007) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad issuing the train subdivision / district list, left justified space filled Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Initialization request 2 - Request for updated list Clearance Number Length 1 Numeric String length of clearance number up to 8 characters Clearance Number Variable Alphanumeric Clearance number Train ID Length 1 Numeric Train ID length up to 30 characters Train ID Variable Alphanumeric Train ID

description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of an unsolicited Train Subdivision/District List ( 01007) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad from which the train subdivision / district list was sent, left justified space filled Subdivision / District List (01007) message (0 -> 65535) Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - Reserved 3 -Reserved 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 -Reserved
source_heading_line: 1.6.6 L2I43 (02008) Confirmation of Train Subdivision/District List - Version 2

description: Sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report the system state of the onboard system. This message may be sent unsolicited or in response to the Command/Confirm Locomotive System State (01010) message. The message may also be sent in response to the Request Selected Train ID (01003) message if the Locomotive is in a non-controlling state.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the system state is being reported, left justified space filled Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Crew initiated change - cut out 2 - Crew initiated change - logoff 3 - Locomotive initiated change 4 - Office commanded change 5 - Sent in response to the 01003 message 6 - Periodic report Locomotive State Summary 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Controlling 2 - Non-controlling Locomotive State 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Self Test 2 - Initializing 3 - Disengaged 4 - Cut Out 5 - Active 6 - Switching 7 - Failed Clearance Number Length 1 Numeric String length of clearance number up to 8 characters Clearance Number Variable Alphanumeric Clearance number

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report the status of the onboard departure test. The Office confirms receipt of the message with the Confirmation of Departure Test Report (01011) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the departure test is being reported, left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Train ID Length 1 Numeric Train ID length up to 30 characters Train ID Variable Alphanumeric Train ID Milepost 4 Numeric Milepost xxxx.xxxx X 10000 location of the locomotive Milepost Prefix Length 1 Numeric Milepost prefix length up to 5 characters Milepost Prefix Variable Alphanumeric Milepost prefix Milepost Suffix Length 1 Numeric Milepost suffix length up to 5 characters Milepost Suffix Variable Alphanumeric Milepost suffix Track name Length 1 Numeric Track name length up to 32 characters Track name Variable Alphanumeric Track name at the location of the locomotive Current Position Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that operates the current subdivision / district of the locomotive, left justified space filled 65535) See design notes below Current Position Uncertainty 2 Numeric Current position uncertainty of the locomotive in feet Current Position 12 ECEF ECEF Position (LSB = 1 centimeter) Byte 0-3 X Coordinate ± 0-900,000,000 cm Byte 4-7 Y Coordinate ± 0-900,000,000 cm Byte 8-11 Z Coordinate ± 0-900,000,000 cm Test Time Stamp 7 Time Test completion date and time YYYYMMDDHHMMSS Test Status 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Pass 2 - Fail Employee ID length 1 Numeric String length of the Employee ID up to 8 characters Employee ID Variable Text ASCII Text Locomotive State Summary 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Controlling 2 - Non-controlling Software Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Onboard Software Version up to 20 characters Release 2.11.1 10/26/2012 Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Onboard Software Version Variable Printable ASCII Onboard software version currently installed

description: Sent by the Locomotive to the Office to register for the Office Segment Poll ( 01021) for a specific subdivision / district. The Office confirms receipt of the message with the Confirmation of Poll Registration (01020) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad issuing the office segment poll message, left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Poll Rate 1 Numeric Poll rate in minutes (3->60). This field is set to 0 when the message is to deregister polling. Train ID Length 1 Numeric Train ID length up to 30 characters Train ID Variable Alphanumeric Train ID Onboard Software Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Onboard Software Version up to 20 characters Onboard Software Version Variable Printable ASCII Onboard software version currently installed Common Configuration Fileset Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Common Configuration Fileset Version up to 20 characters Common Configuration Fileset Version Variable Printable ASCII Common configuration fileset version currently installed Railroad Specific Configuration Fileset Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the Railroad Specific Configuration Fileset Version up to 20 characters Railroad Specific Configuration Fileset Version Variable Printable ASCII Railroad specific configuration fileset version currently installed

description: Sent to the Office to request the current list of mandatory directives and track data that should be onboard for a given subdivision / district ID. The Office confirms receipt of this message with the Current Dataset List ( 01022) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that operates the subdivision / district, left justified space filled Number of Authorities 1 Numeric 0 -> 99 Number of authorities For each authority Repeated as per ‘Number of Authorities’ CRC around Authority Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Authority data Number of Bulletins 1 Numeric 0 -> 255 Number of bulletins For each bulletin Repeated as per ‘Number of Bulletins CRC around Bulletin Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Bulletin data Track Data Version 4 Numeric Track Data version for PTC subdivision / district CRC around Track Data 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Track Data
source_heading_line: 1.6.10 L2I47 (02022) Request Current Dataset List - Version 2

description: This message is sent from Locomotive to the Office to request train consist data. The Office responds with the Train Consist Dataset (01030) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad from which the of train ID confirmation was received , left justified space filled Train ID Length 1 Numeric Train ID length up to 30 characters Train ID Variable Alphanumeric Train ID

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of an unsolicited Train Consist ( 01030) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad from which the train consist message was received, left justified space filled Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - NAK - On-board cut out or failed 3 - NAK - Invalid message 4 - NAK - Not an operating railroad selected for initialization 5 - NAK - Incomplete consist data 6 - NAK - Waiting for solicited consist
source_heading_line: 1.6.12 L2I49 (02031) Confirmation of Train Consist - Version 3

description: This message is sent to the Office to provide crew-entered consist data. This message is sent unsolicited when the Locomotive has new Consist data. The Office confirms receipt of the message with a Confirmation of Onboard Train Consist ( 01033) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the onboard train consist is to be reported, left justified space filled Reporting PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric PTC Subdivision / District ID where the train is located when the message is generated, if known (0 -> 65535) Train Type 1 Enumeration 0 - Unknown 1 - Freight 2 - Passenger 3 - Intermodal 4 - High Speed Passenger 5 - Tilt Train 6 - Commuter Lead Locomotive Orientation 1 Enumeration 0 - Unknown 1 -Front 2 -Back Number of Locomotives 1 Numeric (1 - 24) All locomotive identifiers in train For each Locomotive: Repeated as per ‘Number of Locomotives’ Locomotive ID 10 Alphanumeric Locomotive ID Locomotive Position in Train 2 Numeric (1 - 999) Position of the locomotive in the train Tonnage of Locomotive 2 Numeric (50 - 400) short tons Locomotive Status 1 Enumration 0 - Unknown 1 - Run 2 - Isolated Locomotive Length 1 Numeric (40 - 150) feet Locomotive Horsepower 2 Numeric (0 - 10,000) horsepower Trailing Tonnage 2 Numeric (0 - 45,000) short tons Number of Operative Brakes 2 Numeric (0 - 999) operative brakes Number of Axles 2 Numeric (0 - 3996) axles excluding the locomotives listed under the ‘Number of Locomotives’ field above Train Length 2 Numeric (40-25,000) feet - Total train length (locomotives and cars) Loaded Car Count 2 Numeric (0 - 999) Empty Car Count 2 Numeric (0 - 999) Total Braking Force 4 Numeric (0 - 30,000,000) lbs - Total braking force for the train excluding the locomotives listed under the ‘Number of Locomotives’ field Release 2.11.1 10/26/2012 Field Size (Bytes) Type Description above Maximum Train Speed 1 Numeric (0 - 125) MPH - Maximum train speed

toc_message_name: Confirmation of Crew Acknowledgement of Bulletin
detail_message_name: Confirmation of Crew Acknowledgement of Bulletin
description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Request Crew Acknowledgement of Bulletin Message (01040). This message is an electronic acknowledgement only. The crew response is sent in the Crew Acknowledgement of Mandatory Directive Status Message (02061).
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that issued the bulletin, left justified space filled Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - Reserved 3 - Reserved 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 - Reserved
source_heading_line: 1.6.14 L2I51 (02040) Confirmation of Crew Acknowledgement of Bulletin - Version 1

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request Bulletin Datasets in response to receiving a Current Dataset List (01022) message from the Office. The Office responds with one or more Bulletin Dataset ( 01041) messages, except in the case of an Advisory / Cautionary bulletin, where the Office responds with one or more Text Message ( 01060) messages.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad issuing the bulletin, left justified space filled Number of Bulletins 1 Numeric 0 -> 255 Number of bulletins For each bulletin Repeated as per ‘Number of Bulletins’

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Bulletin Dataset Message ( 01041).
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that issued the bulletin, left justified space filled Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts 1 Numeric Number of PTC subdivisions / districts 1 -> 25 For each PTC Subdivision / District Repeated as per ‘Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts’ Bulletin Type 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Reserved 2 - Reserved 3 - Reserved 4 - Reserved 5 - Speed restriction 6 - Work zone 7 - Grade crossing 8 - Track out of service 9 - Advisory / Cautionary 10 - Critical alert 11 - Reserved CRC-32 of Bulletin Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 of Bulletin Dataset received Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged and track limit validation completed 2 - NAK - CRC-32 failed 3 - NAK - PTC Bulletin Reference Number validation failed 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 - NAK - Failed track limit validation 6 - Acknowledged but track limit validation not completed
source_heading_line: 1.6.16 L2I53 (02042) Confirmation of Bulletin Dataset - Version 3

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Bulletin Cancellation ( 01043) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that issued the bulletin, left justified space filled (1 -> 65535) Bulletin Type 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Reserved 2 - Reserved 3 - Reserved 4 - Reserved 5 - Speed restriction 6 - Work zone 7 - Grade crossing 8 - Track out of service 9 - Advisory / Cautionary 10 - Critical alert 11 - Reserved CRC-32 of Bulletin Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 of bulletin dataset being cancelled Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - NAK - CRC-32 failed 3 - NAK - PTC Bulletin Reference Number validation failed 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 - NAK - Reserved
source_heading_line: 1.6.17 L2I54 (02043) Confirmation of Bulletin Cancellation - Version 1

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to convey the crew request for authority issuance, rollup, time extension or void. The Office confirms receipt of the message with the Confirmation of Crew Authority Request ( 01050) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the crew authority request is being sent, left justified space filled Request Type 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Issue new authority 2 - Time extension of existing authority 3 - Rollup of existing authority 4 - Void existing authority CRC-32 of the Authority 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 of the authority to be modified Time Extension 1 Numeric Extension in minutes Rollup Milepost 4 Numeric Milepost xxxx.xxxx X 10000 Rollup Milepost Prefix Length 1 Numeric Rollup milepost prefix length up to 5 characters Rollup Milepost Prefix Variable Alphanumeric Rollup milepost prefix Rollup Milepost Suffix Length 1 Numeric Rollup milepost suffix length up to 5 characters Rollup Milepost Suffix Variable Alphanumeric Rollup milepost suffix Rollup Milepost Track name Length 1 Numeric Rollup milepost track name length up to 32 characters Rollup Milepost Track name Variable Alphanumeric Rollup milepost track name Rollup PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric PTC Subdivision / District identifier ( 0 -> 65535) Employee First Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee first name up to 20 characters Employee First Name Variable Alphabetic Employee first name Employee Middle Initial Size 1 Numeric Size of employee middle initial up to 1 character Employee Middle Initial Variable Alphabetic Employee middle initial Employee Last Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee last name up to 32 characters Employee Last Name Variable Alphabetic Employee Last Name

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to request Movement Authority Datasets in response to receiving a Current Dataset List (01022) message from the Office. The Office responds with one or more Movement Authority Dataset ( 01051) messages.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad issuing the authority, left justified space filled Number of Authorities 1 Numeric 0 -> 99 Number of authorities For each authority Repeated as per ‘Number of Authorities’
source_heading_line: 1.6.19 L2I56 (02051) Request Movement Authority Dataset - Version 1

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Movement Authority Dataset ( 01051) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad which issued the authority, left justified space filled Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts 1 Numeric Number of PTC subdivisions / districts 1 -> 25 For each PTC Subdivision / District Repeated as per ‘Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts’ CRC-32 of Authority 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 of Authority received Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged and track limit validation completed 2 - NAK - CRC-32 failed 3 - Reserved 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 - NAK - Failed track limit validation 6 - Acknowledged but track limit validation not completed
source_heading_line: 1.6.20 L2I57 (02052) Confirmation of Movement Authority - Version 3

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Movement Authority Void ( 01053) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad which issued the authority, left justified space filled (1 -> 65535) CRC-32 of Authority 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 of Authority being voided Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - NAK - CRC-32 failed 3 - NAK - PTC Authority Reference Number validation failed 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 - NAK - Reserved
source_heading_line: 1.6.21 L2I58 (02053) Confirmation of Movement Authority Void - Version 1

description: This message is used to send a notification from the locomotive to the office that the locomotive has fulfilled authority to either Pass Signal at Stop or Enter Main Track. The Office acknowledges receipt of this notification with a Confirmation of EMT/PSS Authority Used Notification (01054) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that controls the track where the locomotive has passed the signal at stop or entered main track, left justified space filled Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Entered main track on authority received electronically 2 - Passed signal at stop on authority received electronically 3 - Entered main track on authority manually indicated 4 - Passed signal at stop on authority manually indicated Entry Milepost 4 Numeric Milepost, xxxx.xxxx X 10000 at which the leading edge of the train entered main track or passed signal at stop Entry Milepost Prefix Length 1 Numeric Milepost prefix length, up to 5 characters Entry Milepot Prefix Variable Alphanumeric Milepost prefix Entry Milepost Suffix Length 1 Numeric Milepost suffix length, up to 5 characters Entry Milepost Suffix Variable Alphanumeric Milepost suffix Entry Track Name Length 1 Numeric Track name length, up to 32 characters Entry Track Name Variable Alphanumeric Track name Entry PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric PTC Subdivision / district ID Enter Main Track authority (See design notes) CRC around Authority Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the authority dataset (See design notes) Calculated Position Uncertainty 2 Numeric Position uncertainty at the time of entry in feet Site Name 40 Printable ASCII Wayside site name (See design notes) Site Device ID 40 Printable ASCII Wayside device identifier (See design notes) Device Type 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Signal 2 - Switch (See design notes)
source_heading_line: 1.6.22 L2I388 (02054) EMT/PSS Authority Used Notification - Version 2

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Crew Message ( 01060) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad which issued the crew message, left justified space filled CRC 4 CRC-32 This is the CRC-32 received in the Crew Message for which this message is an acknowledgement Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - NAK - CRC-32 failed 3 - NAK - PTC Bulletin Reference number validation failed 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 - NAK - Reserved
source_heading_line: 1.6.23 L2I59 (02060) Confirmation of Crew Message - Version 3

toc_message_name: Crew Acknowledgement of Mandatory Directive Status
detail_message_name: Crew Acknowledgement of Mandatory Directive Status
description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to convey the crew acknowledgement, acceptance or rejection of a mandatory directive. The Office confirms receipt of the message with the Confirmation of Crew Acknowledgement of Mandatory Directive Status ( 01061) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad which issued the mandatory directive, left justified space filled Mandatory Directive Type 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Track warrant / track authority 2 - Track and time / track permit 3 - Enter main track 4 - Pass signal at stop 5 - Speed restriction 6 - Work zone 7 - Grade crossing 8 - Track out of service 9 - Advisory / Cautionary 10 - Critical alert 11 - Crew Message Mandatory Directive Operation 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - New / updated mandatory directive 2 - Cancel / void mandatory directive addressed CRC-32 of the Mandatory Directive 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 of the mandatory directive being addressed Crew Action 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Crew accept 2 - Crew reject 3 - Crew acknowledge (prompted) 4 - Crew acknowledge (manual) Employee First Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee first name up to 20 characters Employee First Name Variable Alphabetic Employee first name Employee Middle Initial Size 1 Numeric Size of employee middle initial up to 1 character Employee Middle Initial Variable Alphabetic Employee middle initial Employee Last Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee last name up to 32 characters Employee Last Name Variable Alphabetic Employee Last Name Release 2.11.1 10/26/2012
source_heading_line: 1.6.24 L2I60 (02061) Crew Acknowledgement of Mandatory Directive Status - Version 2

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm the receipt of the Bulletin Sequece (01062) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the bulletin sequence message, left justified space filled Acknowledgement Indication 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Acknowledged 2 - Reserved 3 -Reserved 4 - NAK - Other reasons 5 -Reserved
source_heading_line: 1.6.25 L2I356 (02062) Confirmation of Bulletin Sequence - Version 2

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report when the train violates its authority. The message is sent when the violation occurs and periodically while the violation exists. The Office confirms receipt of the message with a Confirmation of Violation Report (01070) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the violation is being reported, left justified space filled Violation Start Time 7 Time UTC timestamp in YYYYMMDDHHMMSS format Head End Milepost 4 Numeric Milepost xxxx.xxxx X 10000 Head End Milepost Prefix Length 1 Numeric Head end milepost prefix length up to 5 characters Head End Milepost Prefix Variable Alphanumeric Head end milepost prefix Head End Milepost Suffix Length 1 Numeric Head end milepost suffix length up to 5 characters Head End Milepost Suffix Variable Alphanumeric Head end milepost suffix Head End Track name Length 1 Numeric Head end track name length up to 32 characters Head End Track name Variable Alphanumeric Head end track name Head End Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that operates the head end subdivision / district, left justified space filled Head End PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric Head end PTC Subdivision / district ID (1 -> 65535) Rear End Milepost 4 Numeric Milepost xxxx.xxxx X 10000 Rear End Milepost Prefix Length 1 Numeric Rear end milepost prefix length up to 5 characters Rear End Milepost Prefix Variable Alphanumeric Rear end milepost prefix Rear End Milepost Suffix Length 1 Numeric Rear end milepost suffix length up to 5 characters Rear End Milepost Suffix Variable Alphanumeric Rear end milepost suffix Rear End Track name Length 1 Numeric Rear end track name length up to 32 characters Rear End Track name Variable Alphanumeric Rear end track name Rear End Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad that operates the rear end subdivision / district, left justified space filled Rear End PTC Subdivision / district ID 2 Numeric Rear end PTC Subdivision / district ID (0 -> 65535) See design notes below Current Position Uncertainty 2 Numeric Current position uncertainty of the locomotive in feet Direction of Travel 1 Enumeration 0 - Unknown 1 - Increasing Mileposts 2 - Decreasing Milepos

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to confirm receipt of the Violation Report ( 01071) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the violation report, left justified space filled Point of Violation PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric PTC Subdivision / district where the point of violation was reported (1 -> 65535)
source_heading_line: 1.6.27 L2I62 (02071) Confirmation of Violation Report - Version 2

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report when the train is no longer violating its authority.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the violation cleared is being reported, left justified space filled Reason for sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Train has authority for current location 2 - Onboard system state change 3 - Onboard system does not know current location Point of Violation PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric PTC Subdivision / district where the point of violation was previously reported (1 -> 65535) Violation Cleared Time 7 Time UTC timestamp in YYYYMMDDHHMMSS format Locomotive ID 10 Alphanumeric Locomotive ID of the lead locomotive in the previously violating train

description: This message is sent by the on-board in response to the receipt of the Violation Cleared (01072) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Alphanumeric Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the violation cleared was sent, left justified space filled Point of Violation PTC Subdivision / District ID 2 Numeric PTC Subdivision / district where the point of violation was previously reported (1 -> 65535)
source_heading_line: 1.6.29 L2I384 (02073) Confirmation of Violation Cleared - Version 1

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report crew keypresses when acknowledging the arrival of trains listed in a conditional authority.

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report a change in state for an individual fault. Thi s message is sent unsolicited upon fault change, however in order to limit communication network bandwidth usage, a time filter will be applied.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the Locomotive Fault Report is being reported, left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Vendor Code 4 Printable ASCII Vendor Code, left justified space filled System Code 4 Printable ASCII System Code, left justified space filled Locomotive State Time 7 Time UTC Time locomotive state was sampled Locomotive State Summary 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Controlling 2 - Non-controlling Locomotive State 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Self Test 2 - Initializing 3 - Disengaged 4 - Cut Out 5 - Active 6 - Restricted 7 - Failed Number of Components 1 Numeric Number of components included in this message (1 -> 255) For each Component Repeated as per ‘Number of Components’ Component 1 Numeric Numeric code for component, provided in Vendor Component Data Dictionary Number of Fault State Changes 1 Numeric Number of faults included in this message for this component. (0 -> 255) *See Design Notes For each Fault State Change Repeated as per ‘Number of Fault State Changes’ Fault State 1 Enumeration 0 - Clear 1 - Active 2 - Intermittent Fault Code 2 Numeric Unique code number for the fault, provided in Vendor Component Data Dictionary Release 3.1 10/20/2017 Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Length of Fault Name Text 1 Numeric String length of fault description up to 64 characters Fault Name Text Variable Printable ASCII Description of fault, provided in Vendor Component Data Dictionary Time Fault Detected 7 Time UTC Time when fault changed to its present state

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to report the current configuration information. This me ssage is sent in response to the Request Onboard Component Configuration (01088) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the owning railroad for the locomotive if the reason for sending is ‘Unsolicited’ or the railroad which sent the Onboard Component Configuration Request if the reason for sending is ‘Solicited by a 01088 message’, left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not Used 1 - Unsolicited 2 - Solicited by a 01088 message Vendor Code 4 Printable ASCII Vendor Code, left justified space filled System Code 4 Printable ASCII System Code, left justified space filled Number of Components 1 Numeric Number of components included in this message (1 -> 255) For each Component Repeated as per ‘Number of Components’ Component 1 Numeric Numeric code for component, provided in Vendor Component Data Dictionary Number of Configuration Items 1 Numeric Number of Configuration items for this component. (0 -> 40) For each Configuration Item Repeated as per ‘Number of Configuration Items Configuration Item Code 1 Numeric Unique code number for the configuration item, provided in Vendor Component Data Dictionary Configuration Item Text Size 1 Numeric String length of the configuration item text up to 32 characters Configuration Item Text Variable Printable ASCII Description of configuration item, provided in Vendor Component Data Dictionary
source_heading_line: 1.6.40 L2I358 (02088) Onboard Component Configuration Report - Version 5

description: This message is sent from the Locomotive to the Office to request the current fileset list. The Office responds with a Fileset List (01100) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the fileset list is being sent, left justified space filled ICD Version Length 1 Numeric Length of the ICD Version name (1 - 20) ICD Version Variable Printable ASCII Office-Locomotive Segment ICD Version Owning RR SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the owning railroad for the locomotive Sequence number 1 Numeric Sequence number used to match the request in the 02100 message with the 01100 response 0 - this message is an unsolicited status update or a response to a request non-zero - this message is a request for a Fileset List Repository Count 1 Numeric Number of repositories (0 -> 10) For each Repository Repeated as per ‘Repository Count’ Repository Name Length 1 Numeric Number of characters in the Repository Name (1 -> 50) Repository Name Variable Printable ASCII Repository Name Fileset Count 1 Numeric 0 -> 255 Fileset count For each Fileset Repeated as per ‘Fileset Count’ Flags 1 Numeric bit 0: not used bit 1: 1 = fileset downloaded / 0 = fileset not downloaded bit 2: 1 = fileset index downloaded only / 0 = all files downloaded bit 3 - 7: not used Fileset Index File Size 4 Numeric Size of the fileset index file MD5 16 Numeric MD5 sum over the Fileset contents

description: This message is sent by the Locomotive to request download of a File set from the Office. The Office responds with the File Info (01101) message or a No File (01104) message if the requested file does not exist.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the fileset list, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier set by the Locomotive Encryption Types Supported 1 Numeric Identifies Encryption Options that the Client can support Bit 0: set to 1, ignored Bit 1: 1 = AES128 with OPK / 0 = not supported Bit 2: reserved for enum (2) Bit 3: reserved for enum (3) Bit 4: reserved for enum (4) Bit 5: reserved for enum (5) Bit 6: reserved for enum (6) Bit 7: reserved for enum (7) Compression Types Supported 1 Numeric Identifies Compression Options that the Client can support Bit 0: set to 1, ignored Bit 1: 1 = GZIP / 0 = not supported Bit 2: reserved for enum (2) Bit 3: reserved for enum (3) Bit 4: reserved for enum (4) Bit 5: reserved for enum (5) Bit 6: reserved for enum (6) Bit 7: reserved for enum (7) File Pathname Variable Printable ASCII Full file pathname, maximum string length of 1024

description: This message is sent by the Locomotive to request information on the ch ecksum over a portion of a file that is available for transfer to aid in resuming download of the file. The Office responds with the File Part Checksum (01102) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the file info, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the File Info message Offset 4 Numeric Offset into the file Suggested Delta 2 Numeric Desired offset difference between MD5 checksums
source_heading_line: 1.6.43 L2I73 (02102) File Part Checksum Request - Version 2

description: This message is sent by the Locomotive to the Office to request a data chunk for a specified file and offset. The Office responds with a File Data (01103) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the file info, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the associated File Info message Offset 4 Numeric Offset of the data within the file Maximum data size 2 Numeric Maximum size of the data

description: This message is sent to notify the Office that the Locomotive has the up -to-date file.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the file data, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the associated File Info message

description: This message is sent to notify the Office that the Locomotive cannot download files at this time.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad managing the file, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the associated File Info message Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not Used 1 - Insufficient space 2 - Corrupt File 3 - Reserved Total Space 4 Numeric Total space allowed for MDM file downloads in kB Space Available 4 Numeric Available space for MDM file downloads in kB Number of Railroads 1 Numeric Number of railroads (1 -> 30) For each Railroad Repeated as per ‘Number of Railroads’ Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC, left justified space filled Total Fileset Size 4 Numeric Size, in bytes, of all files designated by the railroad in the last received Fileset List (01100) message

description: This message is sent by the Locomotive to provide information on a file that is available for transfer. It is s ent in response to the File Request (01120) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the file request, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the File Request message File Size 4 Numeric File size File MD5 16 Numeric MD5 sum over the file contents File Pathname Variable Printable ASCII Full file pathname, maximum string length of 1024

description: This message is sent by the Locomotive to indicate that there are no matches to the pattern described in the Fil e Request (01120) message left to process.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the file request, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Matches the Transaction ID in the File Request message

description: This message is sent to the Office to provide the data chunk from a file at a specified index as requested in the File Data Request (01122) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad which sent the file data request, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the associated File Info message Offset 4 Numeric Offset of the data within the file Size of data 2 Numeric Size of data (0 - 8092 bytes) Data Variable Numeric Data bytes CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC around the ‘Data’ field

description: This message is sent to WSRS to subscribe for WIUStatus messages for a WIU.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description WIU ID 8 Numeric WIU ID for which the locomotive is subscribing. Right justified and padded with leading zeros. Subscription Timeframe 2 Numeric Time in seconds the WSRS should consider this subscription valid

description: This message is sent to the WSRS to unsubscribe for WIUStatus messages for a WIU.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description WIU ID 8 Numeric WIU ID to be unsubscribed. Right justified and padded with leading zeros.

description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to report the verification status of employee data sent to the Office in the Verify Employee Info Request (02000) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the employee information verification request was sent, left justified space filled Verification Status 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Employee info verified 2 - Employee info not verified Employee Identifier Length 1 Numeric String length of the Employee Identifier up to 8 characters Employee Identifier Variable Printable ASCII Employee identifier Employee First Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee first name up to 20 characters Employee First Name Variable Printable ASCII Employee first name Employee Middle Initial Size 1 Numeric Size of employee middle initial up to 1 character Employee Middle Initial Variable Printable ASCII Employee middle initial Employee Last Name Size 1 Numeric Size of employee last name up to 32 characters Employee Last Name Variable Printable ASCII Employee Last Name Size of Reason Text 1 Numeric Size of text following up to 45 characters Reason Text Variable Printable ASCII Text describing reason employee info was not verified
source_heading_line: 1.5.1 L2I1 (01000) Verify Employee Info Response - Version 3

description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to provide a list of train symbols to which the Locomotive is assigned. It is sent in response to the Request Train ID List (02001) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the train ID list request was sent, left justified space filled Number of Train IDs 1 Numeric Number of train IDs (0 -> 12) For each Train ID Repeated as per ‘Number of Train IDs’ Train ID Length 1 Numeric Train ID length up to 30 characters Train ID Variable Printable ASCII Train ID with length as defined in ‘Train ID Length’ field Display Train ID Length 1 Numeric Display Train ID length up to 30 characters Display Train ID Variable Printable ASCII Display Train ID with length as defined in ‘Display Train ID Length’ field

description: Sent from the Office to the Locomotive to request the Selected Train ID (02003) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad requesting the train ID, left justified space filled
source_heading_line: 1.5.3 L2I3 (01003) Request Selected Train ID - Version 2

description: Sent from the Office to the Locomotive to confirm receipt of the Selected Train ID (02003) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the selected train ID message was sent, left justified space filled
source_heading_line: 1.5.4 L2I4 (01004) Confirmation of Selected Train ID - Version 3

description: Sent from the Office to the Locomotive to provide information on the Locomotive configuration versions. This message is sent in response to the Configuration Version List Request (02005) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the configuration version list request was sent, left justified space filled Number of Repositories 1 Numeric Number of repositories (1 -> 4) For each Repository Repeated as per ‘Number of Repositories’ Repository Name Length 1 Numeric String length of the repository name up to 50 characters Repository Name Variable Printable ASCII Repository name Number of Fileset Versions 1 Numeric Number of preferred or acceptable versions for the repository (0 -> 10) For each Fileset Version Fileset Version Length 1 Numeric String length of the version up to 20 characters Fileset Version Variable Printable ASCII Version string Fileset MD5 4 Numeric First four bytes of the MD5 hash over the fileset Fileset Status 1 Enumeration 0 - Not Used 1 - Preferred 2 - Acceptable Configuration Version List CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC over all of the above fields

description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to provide a list of PTC subdivisions/districts for which the Locomotive needs mandatory directives. It is sent in response to the Request Train Subdivision/District List (02007) message. It is also sent unsolicited if the Office receives a change in the train subdivision/district list to distribute to the Locomotive. The Locomotive confirms receipt of an unsolicited message with the Confirmation of Train Subdivision/District List (02008) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Solicited 2 - Unsolicited THIS FIELD IS NOT INCLUDED IN THE CRC Subdivision / District List (02008) message should be directed (0 -> 65535) see design notes below THIS FIELD IS NOT INCLUDED IN THE CRC Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad providing the list of subdivisions/districts, left justified space filled Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts 1 Numeric Number of PTC subdivisions/districts in the Subdivision/District list up to 99 For each PTC Subdivision / District Repeated as per ‘Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts’ Track Data Version 4 Numeric Track Data version for subdivision/district CRC around Track Data 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Track Data CRC 4 CRC-32 The CRC applies to all the fields from the ‘Railroad SCAC’ through ‘CRC around Track Data’

description: This message is sent to the Locomotive either unsolicited in order to command the Locomotive to become non -controlling or in response to the Locomotive System State (02010) message to confirm receipt of the message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad commanding/confirming the locomotive system state, left justified space filled Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Command locomotive system state to Non-controlling 2 - Confirm receipt of 02010 message Reason Text Length 1 Numeric Size of text following up to 50 characters Reason Text Variable Printable ASCII Reason text to be displayed to the crew when the office commands the locomotive system state to non-controlling
source_heading_line: 1.5.7 L2I8 (01010) Command/Confirm Locomotive System State - Version 3

description: This message is sent from Office to the Locomotive to confirm receipt of the Departure Test Report ( 02011) message and to provide, if possible, a text description of the departure test location.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the departure test was reported, left justified space filled Departure Test Location Text Length 1 Numeric Size of text following up to 45 characters Departure Test Location Text Variable Printable ASCII Text description of departure test location
source_heading_line: 1.5.8 L2I9 (01011) Confirmation of Departure Test Report - Version 3

description: This message is sent from the Office to the Locomotive to provide track data version information for an ancilla ry subdivision/district. This message is sent in response to a Request Ancillary Subdivision/District Version (02012) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad that operates the ancillary subdivision/district, left justified space filled subdivision/district Track Data Version 4 Numeric Track data version for the ancillary subdivision/district CRC around Track Data 4 CRC-32 CRC around the track data for the ancillary subdivision/district Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Providing subdivision/district version 2 - Unknown subdivision/district requested

description: Sent by the Office to the Locomotive to confirm receipt of the Poll Registration ( 02020) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the poll registration was sent, left justified space filled Reason for Sending 1 Enumeration 0 - Not Used 1 - Confirm receipt of valid poll registration 2 - NAK - invalid subdivision/district list 3 - NAK - invalid subdivision/district ID 4 - Reserved 5 - NAK - Other 6 - NAK - office does not support poll registration for ancillary subdivisions/districts Track Data Version 4 Numeric Track Data version for subdivision/district CRC around Track Data 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Track Data Poll Rate 1 Numeric Specified poll rate for the subdivision in minutes (0->60)
source_heading_line: 1.5.10 L2I10 (01020) Confirmation of Poll Registration - Version 4

description: Sent by the Office to the Locomotive to provide information on the current set of mandatory directives and track data for one or more subdivisions / districts and the status of control points for which the Locomotive has registered within those subdivisions / districts. The Locomotive registers for polls for a specific subdivision / district with the Poll Registration (02020) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the poll registration was sent, left justified space filled Train Subdivision/District List CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC calculated over the train subdivision/district list received in the Train Subdivision/District List message Configuration Version List CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC calculated over the list of configuration versions in the 01005 message Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts 1 Numeric Number of PTC subdivisions or districts up to 99 For each PTC Subdivision / District Repeated as per ‘Number of PTC Subdivisions / Districts’ Office state 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Explicit 2 - Non-explicit 3 - Synchronizing 4 - No CAD support Dataset CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC calculated over track data and all mandatory directive datasets and text for the subdivision / district which are expected to be onboard IC3 Uniqueness Index 1 Numeric An ever-changing value that is included in the Composite CRC Composite CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC calculated over IC3 Authority CRCs and IC3 Bulletin CRCs

description: Sent to the Locomotive to provide the current list of mandatory directives and track data that should be onboard for a given subdivision / district. This message is sent in response to the Request Current Dataset List (02022) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad that operates the subdivision / district, left justified space filled Dataset CRC 4 CRC-32 See design notes Number of Authorities 1 Numeric 0 -> 99 Number of authorities For each authority Repeated as per ‘Number of Authorities’ CRC around Authority Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Authority data Number of Bulletins 1 Numeric 0 -> 255 Number of bulletins For each bulletin Repeated as per ‘Number of Bulletins CRC around Bulletin Dataset 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Bulletin data Track Data Version 4 Numeric Track Data version for PTC subdivision / district CRC around Track Data 4 CRC-32 CRC-32 around the Track Data

description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to provide Consist data. This message is sent in response to the Request Train Consist (02030) message. It is also sent unsolicited when the Office has new Consist data to distribute to the Locomotive. The Locomotive confirms receipt of the message with a Confirmation of Train Consist (02031) message.

description: This message is sent to the Locomotive to request the issuance of a position message or to set the rate of unsolicited position messages from the Locomotive. The Locomotive responds with a Locomotive Position Report ( 02080) upon receipt of this request.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad that is requesting the locomotive position report, left justified space filled Action Requested 1 Enumeration 0 - Not used 1 - Send position report only (no parameter change) 2 - Send position report and set parameters as specified 3 - Send position report and clear parameters Set time elapsed 2 Numeric Sets the time elapsed threshold for the locomotive to report position. Units are in seconds. Set distance elapsed 2 Numeric Sets the distance elapsed threshold for the locomotive to report position. Units are in 1/10th mile increments.

description: This message is sent by the Office to the Locomotive to provide the current fileset list. It is sent in respons e to the Client Fileset List (02100) message. It is also sent unsolicited when a new Fileset List is available.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad providing the current fileset list, left justified space filled Sequence Number 1 Numeric Sequence number used to match the response in the 01100 message with the 02100 request 0 - this message is unsolicited non-zero - this message is a response to a Client Fileset List message from which the value is copied Action Flag 1 Enumeration 0: Filesets Included 1: Invalid SCAC 2: Unable to Access Repository Repository Count 1 Numeric Number of repositories (0 -> 10) For each Repository Repeated as per ‘Repository Count’ Repository Name Length 1 Numeric Number of characters in the Repository Name (1 -> 50) Repository Name Variable Printable ASCII Repository Name Fileset List Time Stamp 7 Time The Date/Time when the Fileset List was created for this repository for this locomotive YYYYMMDDHHMMSS Fileset Count 1 Numeric 0 -> 255 Number of filesets For each Fileset: Repeated as per ‘Fileset Count’ Fileset Flag 1 Enumeration 0 - Not urgent 1 - Urgent Fileset Size 4 Numeric Size, in bytes, of the fileset MD5 16 Numeric MD5 sum over the Fileset contents

description: This message is sent by the Office to provide information on a file that is available for transfer. It is sent in response to the File Info Request (02101) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the file info request was sent, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier received in the File Info Request Encryption/Compression Types 1 Numeric Bits 0 - 2: Encryption Enumeration 0 = No Encryption 1 = AES-128 Encryption 2 - 7 = Reserved for Encryption Type Bits 3 - 5: Compression Enumeration 0 = No Compression 1 = GZIP Compression 2 - 7 = Reserved for Compression Type Bits 6 - 7: Reserved File Size 4 Numeric File size of file to be sent over air to MDM Client File MD5 16 Numeric MD5 sum over the file contents File Pathname Variable Printable ASCII Full file pathname, maximum string length of 1024

description: This message is sent by the Office to provide information on the checksum over a portion of a file that is avail able for transfer to aid the locomotive in resuming download of the file. It is sent in response to the File Part Checksum Request (02102) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the the file part checksum request was sent, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the File Part Checksum Request message Checksum Count 1 Numeric Number of checksums (0 -> 8) Repeated for each Checksum Byte Count 4 Numeric Number of bytes that the MD5 sum covers starting at byte 0 MD5 16 Numeric MD5 sum over the data (bytes 0 - Byte Count bytes)

description: This message is sent by the Office to provide the data chunk from a file at a specified index as requested in the File Data Request (02103) message.
functional_content_excerpt: Field Size (Bytes) Type Description Railroad SCAC 4 Printable ASCII Railroad SCAC of the railroad to which the file data request was sent, left justified space filled Transaction ID 1 Numeric Transaction identifier from the associated File Info message Offset 4 Numeric Offset of the data within the file Size of data 2 Numeric Size of data in bytes Data Variable Numeric Data bytes CRC 4 CRC-32 CRC around the ‘Data’ field
